data.name: Island SAGA
data.detailed_description:
○委託

本遊戲為藉由解決居民各種煩惱的方式來進行故事情節。
請前往公會接受各式各樣的委託吧。


○戰鬥系統

・閃技

「閃技」是在戰鬥中藉由亮燈炮來學習到新的技能。
越低等的技能越容易閃出、反之則越難閃出。
且閃技當中也有所謂的「閃技派生招式」。

・連攜

在戰鬥中角色們所使用的招式有可能會連接起來。
此現象稱為「連攜」。
越多招式連接給予敵方的損傷也越大，連攜名稱也非常獨特。
請以５連攜為目標吧。

・陣型

在遊戲中可取得「陣型書」，帶去給特定的NPC後即可學會新陣型。
如果敵人打不贏的話可以試著改變陣型後再挑戰看看喔。


○成長系統

IslandSAGA並非等級制。
戰鬥時所使用的「武器 / 招式 / 魔法」設有經驗值，達到一定數值後各能力會上升。
譬如使用劍的話HP與攻擊力，而使用魔法的話MP與魔功力會上升。
請依照您的喜好來培養戰鬥角色吧。

data.short_description: IslandSAGA是由玩家(男主角)與４位巨乳美女一同於冒險者聚集之島嶼「愛愛島」尋找真實的愛情秘寶「真愛石」的RPG冒險遊戲。
data.supported_languages:
英文, 日文*, 繁體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz processor
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Not an integrated video card; DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Installing on a SSD is strongly recommended; Close browsers and other programs before running the game
pc_requirements.recommended:

  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: 3+ GHz processor
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Not an integrated video card; DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Install on a SSD; Close browsers and other programs before running the game

  • 備註: Installing on a SSD is strongly recommended; Close browsers and other programs before running the game

data.name: Island SAGA
data.detailed_description:
⚠ Please make a habit of saving frequently especially before an event! ⚠
⚠ Island SAGA runs on RPGMaker MV, which performs very poorly when you have a browser running! ⚠

In Island SAGA, you play as the protagonist character as you explore the island of adventure, Valentine Island, with your four royal and royally busty party members in order to search for the fabled treasure of love known as the Love Rheid in this RPG inspired by a very famous classic RPG series!

★ BATTLE SYSTEM ★


In Island SAGA, you control all of your five party member in a classic turn-based battle system.
Each of your party member can use any weapon type and any magic type.
With the TECH SPARKING system, each of your party members can learn new skills as they keep using the same weapon type or magic type.
Instead of leveling up, Island SAGA uses the GROWTH system to increase your stats after battle.
Beat down your foes with COMBINATION ATTACKS that automatically trigger when the conditions are right!
Set the FORMATION for your party, grab the QUESTS from the guild, and prepare for a grand adventure on Valentine Island with your beautiful party members!

★ FEATURES ★


Plot!
Eight big PLOTS!
Battle lines for the heroines voiced by famous Japanese voice actors!
Randomized loot!
5 difficulty settings, suitable for players who just want to enjoy the story and hijinks and for players who really want a challenge!
50 Quests to take and accept!
6 Weapon Arts types (Sword, Greatsword, Spear, Axe, Bow, Martial Arts) featuring techs like Dragon's Tail, Waterfowl Blade, Scattered Petals, Shooting Star, Time Lapse, Reverse Delta, and Air Throw!
6 Magic schools (Fire, Water, Wind, Earth, Light, Dark) featuring spells like Fire Whip, Squall, Vacuum Slash, Reverse Gravity, Sun Ray, and Soul Freeze!

Controls

Island SAGA can be played using keyboard only, mouse plus keyboard, or a XInput game controller.
However, it is recommended that you have access to a keyboard during the sex scenes for the keyboard-only functions.
Most of the keys can also be remapped ingame.

Playtime

Roughly 12-16 hours for first playthrough.

Note

Island SAGA is made with RPG Maker MV, which isn't known to work well with older computers or laptops.
Please close your browser and other extra running programs before playing Island SAGA.
All the main characters that appear in this game are over the age of 18.

data.short_description: It's time for an adventure!! Legends have it that there are mythical treasures lying deep within Valentine Island. Together with your four beautiful and well-stacked companions, will you be able to find it in this lighthearted and sometimes heart-pounding RPG?!
data.supported_languages:
English, Japanese*, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • Processor: 2+ GHz processor
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Not an integrated video card; DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 6 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: Installing on a SSD is strongly recommended; Close browsers and other programs before running the game
